name: James Sykes
background: Mr. Sykes has over 15 years of uranium exploration and discovery experience in the Athabasca Basin. He was instrumental in the discovery of the Roughrider, Arrow, and Triple R deposits. He previously served as Vice President, Exploration for Appia Energy Corp. and has held roles with NexGen Energy, Hathor Exploration, and Rio Tinto.

commpanies.name: Baselode Energy Corp.
commpanies.title_or_role: Chief Executive Officer and President, Director
